title: hieracium sylvaticum subsp. siliginellum
intro: Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. siliginellum, also known as Hawkweed or Devil's-bit, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. siliginellum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, often used in herbal remedies to aid in wound healing, lower fever, and alleviate digestive issues.
